commands.review_summary:
Adds active completion-blocker tracking for Codex execution item lifecycles and makes the completion-idle watchdog wait while those items are active.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +156. Total +205 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main can arm and fire completion-idle timeout without considering active native Codex item lifecycles, and the linked issue plus PR body include live before/after timeout logs for the Computer Use path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the watchdog availability tradeoff, not an automated repair task.
